message:
feat: add file watcher debouncer utility

Provides a reusable event debouncing mechanism for file system watchers,
preventing callback floods during rapid file changes.

**New Package: internal/watcher/**

Debouncer (debouncer.go):
- Thread-safe with mutex protection
- Configurable debounce duration (default: 250ms)
- Timer-based callback scheduling
- Cancel/reset support for pending callbacks

API:
  NewDebouncer(duration) *Debouncer
  debouncer.Trigger(callback)  // Schedule or reset timer
  debouncer.Cancel()           // Cancel pending callback

Behavior:
- First call to Trigger() starts the timer
- Subsequent calls within the duration reset the timer
- Callback fires only after duration passes without new triggers
- Cancel() stops any pending callback

Use cases (not yet integrated):
- Watch project files for changes and auto-refresh dashboard
- Debounce config file reloads
- Trigger agent notifications on file changes
- Implement live-reload for development

This utility is designed for future integration with file watching
features like automatic session refresh and config hot-reload.
